name: Salmon Croquettes
recipeIngredient: Dill and lemon wedges for garnish
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the salmon, reserving 1/4 cup of liquid. Remove the skin and bones.
2. Place the salmon in a mixing bowl and break it up into smaller pieces.
3. Add the egg to the salmon mixture and mix thoroughly.
4. Stir in the flour, potato flakes, onion, and black pepper until combined.
5. Combine the baking powder with the reserved 1/4 cup of liquid.
6. Mix this combination into the salmon mixture until well incorporated.
7. Form the mixture into 24 croquettes.
8. Heat oil for frying and drop the croquettes in without crowding.
9. Fry for 3-5 minutes or until golden brown on all sides.
10. Drain on paper towels.
11. Garnish with dill and lemon wedges. If the mixture is not easy to shape, cover and chill for 30 to 40 minutes.
